textByHashes.96cb13736a3535da869da2e5fe881e1c3493c399: Welcome to the Laughing Miner pub, human traveller.
textByHashes.8acf2c6af6727a5a35a1f861667a5fba803a655e: Sorry, we've stopped serving those. The seeds were too hard to get.
textByHashes.10e689488218930897c21ab9458f45d21ef8a05c: They're quite hard to come by, and I believe you've already got one.
textByHashes.2b0aec018484fae266578b9e42dabfd3be519d71: Here, I found a little left over Kelda stout, just enough for a glass. Take it.
textByHashes.a0e4bdbb5ece861386177e08b1ff98cf8e2dbe2a: I don't think I'd be able to sell it to anyone.
textByHashes.1ffc6d2b1598bc0353831570d188bd45d015339f: Oh, him. Yes, we employ him to advertise our pub, he's the cheapest labour we could find. We don't have a lot of money to spare you know, we pay him in beer.
textByHashes.d644ec9e4b0be2d9504f56ecc0aba7edea8422b6: I told you, he's cheap. He couldn't get any other work since the Red Axe fired him. Been drinking ever since.
textByHashes.99da6f9227bda34f0153f4d64995e2863843ef3e: I'm not quite sure, I think he kept wearing the wrong coloured cap all the time. They don't much like it if you don't wear your red uniform into work.
textByHashes.d0aa56794c5167b1115279f0e490201ab36bb8e1: The Red Axe will fire you for just about anything if they want to.
textByHashes.d0283ead26ccd0cc550a73f9208c83b1629ce7cc: I can make you a stew for 20 gold coins.
textByHashes.f862fcb9e3098d2fce541784c623db4f88b89230: I don't think I'll be able to sell it to anyone.
textByHashes.e98f18d045945a67262086e25bde2c7f11e785aa: 4 Pints coming right up. Are you expecting guests?
textByHashes.df0507081e591b8bac08517354258c4753a47c56: You want me to put it on your tab?
